rulings.Case Title: TYRONE L. ADAMS VS. CHARLES L. EASLEY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion Authorizing Appearance Of Mark J. Felton As Personal Representative Of Decedent Defendant Donald George Felton
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 9, 2020 line 1. DEFENDANT DON FELTON MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion Authorizing Appearance Of Mark J. Felton As Personal Representative Of Decedent Defendant Donald George Felton is GRANTED. Mark J. Felton, personal representative, may appear in this action for decedent Donald Felton, an individual. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: HENRY CHAN ET AL VS. MARK W. TSANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Fourth Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 9, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANT SIU CHAN, JUSTIN TIN Notice Of Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Fourth Amended Complaint is DENIED in part and Moot in part. Motion is DENIED as to the request for punitive damages. Motion is otherwise moot in light of the ruling on the demurrer. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: HENRY CHAN ET AL VS. MARK W. TSANG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 9, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANT SIU CHAN, JUSTIN TIN DEMURRER to 4TH Amended COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with final leave to amend. Demurrer to the causes of action for breach of contract, open account, and unjust enrichment is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in clear and concise language facts giving rise to these causes of action, including but not limited to: (1) the "final" terms of the contract they are suing on; (2) are they alleging a breach of 3 separate contracts or one contract (what are the exact final terms of the one contract); (3) are they seeking a reformation of Contract B (allegations as to the content of Contract B are contrary to the plain language of the contract attached) and exactly what reformation is being sought; (4) facts to remove the contract/contract from the statute of frauds and statute of limitations. Demurer to the cause of action for elder abuse is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts in support of each element of this cause of action as to the moving defendant. Plaintiff to identify elements of each of these causes of action and allege facts in support of each element as to each defendant. All new allegations shall be in bold font. Plaintiffs' request for leave to amend to add causes of action/allegations unrelated to the demurrer is DENIED at this time. Any such request shall be made by a properly noticed motion. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: RONALD ANTHONY YATES VS. KATHRYN R. DEVINCENZI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File 1st Amended Complaint; Memorandum Of Points & Authorities In Support
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 9, 2020 line 3. PLAINTIFF RONALD YATES MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File 1st Amended Complaint is GRANTED. First Amended Complaint to be filed and served forthwith. The Court notes that the moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B, no courtesy copies of the moving papers and reply were received. Failure to comply in the future by the moving party or its counsel will result in motion being taken off calendar. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: FRANCINE VERDIER VS. TONY SINGH ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Def. Motion To Dismiss And Notice Of Hearing
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 9, 2020 line 4. DEFENDANT TONY SINGH Def. Motion To Dismiss And Notice Of Hearing is DENIED without prejudice. No order sustaining Defendant Singh's demurrer on file. Defendant Ngo provided a proposed order on his demurrer on November 4, 2020 in response to the tentative ruling. Order was executed on November 5, 2020 at the hearing. No proposed order was received from Defendant Singh for November 5, 2020 hearing. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC VS. ANDRE SMITH ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Motion To Compel; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Katherine Sass
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 9, 2020 line 5. DEFENDANT ANDRE SMITH Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Motion To Compel is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Complete verified responses without objections shall be provided within 5 days of notice of entry of order by mail and e-mail. Sanctions granted in the amount of $960 to be paid within 30 days of notice of entry of order. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: RED VICTORIAN, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. ADAM RICE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 9, 2020 line 6. DEFENDANT MICHAEL THURIN, ADAM RICE, GIA REGALADO, PUMA CARPIO, MICHAEL BOREL, SAMUEL HOGAN MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is transferred to Department 304 to be heard by the Honorable Anne-Christine Massullo on December 10, 2020 at 9:15 a.m. Additionally, Defendant's Motion for Leave to File Amended Answer is advanced to be heard on December 10, 2020 at 9:15 a.m. ex-parte application and order of the presiding judge. =(501/CFH)
